example: She enjoys yoga because it helps her connect with her body and find inner balance.
He gave me a high-five, slapping his hand against mine.
He got a sunburn on his arm after spending the day at the beach.
He traced patterns in the sand with his foot, leaving temporary imprints.
The cat gently nudged its head against my hand, seeking affection.
He stretched his legs before going for a run to prevent muscle cramps.
He felt a sharp pain in his knee after twisting it during a sports activity.
He bent his back to lift the heavy box.
He felt a sense of relief when the doctor assured him that his stomach issue was temporary.
